1A34:1F02.label: int10h_call
1A34:1F02.comment: INT 10h wrapper — saves/restores BP, SI, DI across the BIOS call

1A34:283E.label: detect_video_card
1A34:283E.comment: Probes VGA (AH=1Bh) → EGA (AH=12h BL=10h) → AH=EFh vendor extension in order; first match wins. No register return value — results written to memory: [0xcfc4]=card type (0x02=CGA, 0x04=EGA, 0x08=SVGA, 0x10=VGA), [0xcfc5]=VGA flag (0x02=CGA/EGA, 0x18=VGA/SVGA), [0xcfc1]=subtype (0x00=basic, 0x01=EGA/SVGA), [0xcfc6]=memory size in KB ((BL+1)*64).

1A34:29CB.label: get_screen_dimensions
1A34:29CB.comment: Calls INT 10h AH=11h AL=30h to get font height and row count. DL preset to 0x18 (25 rows) before the call; result is DL+1 stored as row count. CX (char height) and ES:BP (font pointer) are not returned by our CGA stub.

1A34:2553.label: set_text_color
1A34:2553.comment: Sets the foreground text color attribute stored at [0xd07e]/[0xd07f]. AL=color index on entry. Clamps to max allowed (0x1f in non-mono mode, [0xa3ab] in mono). Assembles final attribute byte into [0xd07f] from color, blink/intensity bit ([0xd07e] bit 4), and background ([0xd07a]).

1A34:2577.label: compute_text_attribute
1A34:2577.comment: Rebuilds [0xd07f] (the current text attribute byte) from component fields: foreground=[0xd07e] bits 0-3, intensity=[0xd07e] bit 4 (shifted to bit 7), background=[0xd07a] bits 0-3 (shifted to bits 4-6). In non-mono mode (default) ANDs foreground with 0x0f.

1A34:2668.label: init_video_mode_config
1A34:2668.comment: Sets up the video mode config table in DS:0xa3a0. CX=0x27: fills DS:0xa3d6 with 0x2926 (the stub 'stc; ret' address) as the default handler for all mode dispatch slots, then copies 39 bytes from CS:BX (the mode-specific config record) into DS:0xa3a0. Calls [0xa3e2] (mode-init hook, set to 0x2926 = stc; ret for CGA — no INT 10h AH=00h is issued for CGA). BX=0x0f33 for mode 3 (80-col CGA text).

1A34:2818.label: read_hw_state
1A34:2818.comment: Reads BIOS equipment flags from [0x0410] into [0xcfc2]/[0xcfc3] (copy used throughout CheckIt). Calls INT 10h AH=0Fh to get current video mode → [0xa39a]=mode, [0xa3a1]=mode, [0xa415]=page (DX). Then calls detect_video_card. Called via 'call far 1A34:2818' from the video init sequence.

1A34:2374.label: clear_screen_state
1A34:2374.comment: Calls func_1A34_230D with AX=0 to flush/clear screen state, then sets [0xcff2]=0x00. Used at the start of the video init sequence to reset display before reconfiguring.

31A9:438E.label: bios_intr_call
31A9:438E.comment: Self-modifying generic BIOS interrupt trampoline (Borland/Turbo Pascal Intr() equivalent). Parameters: [bp+0x06]=interrupt number (e.g. 0x10), [bp+0x08]=far ptr to register struct (AX/BX/CX/DX/BP/SI/DI/ES/DS), [bp+0x0c]=far ptr to output register struct. Patches the interrupt number byte at CS:0x43D0 (the 'INT xx' opcode) before executing, then saves all post-interrupt register values back to the output struct. Called 6 times for INT 10h during the initial text UI rendering phase.

1A34:2893.label: check_ega
1A34:2893.comment: VGA absent (AL≠0x1B); probe EGA via AH=12h BL=10h. BL=0x10 sentinel: EGA clears bits 2-7 of BL on return (e.g. BL=0x03 = 256K). If bits 2-7 still set → EGA absent → jump to check_mda_or_tseng.

1A34:28AB.label: ega_color_confirmed
1A34:28AB.comment: EGA on non-MDA display. Checks BH (display state from AH=12h: 0=color, 1=mono) against AH (zeroed by AND at 28A2). If BH=0 (color), AH=BH → equal → proceed to set EGA type. If BH≠0 (mono EGA), jne to check_mda_or_tseng.

1A34:28CB.label: vga_compute_memory
1A34:28CB.comment: Shared memory size calculation for VGA and EGA paths. BL encodes memory banks: for EGA from AH=12h (0=64K, 1=128K, 2=192K, 3=256K); for VGA from AH=1Bh state buffer at [0xd0fc] (our stub leaves this 0 due to ES:DI=0:0 bug). Formula: (BL+1)<<6 = KB. EGA 256K: BL=3 → 0x100. VGA: BL=0 → 0x40.

1A34:28D9.label: check_mda_or_tseng
1A34:28D9.comment: EGA absent or EGA on mono display; reads equipment flags [0xcfc3] bits 4-5 to distinguish MDA (0x30) from other cards. AL=0x20 → 80-col CGA → not MDA → fall to AH=EFh probe

1A34:28F0.label: probe_efh_and_exit
1A34:28F0.comment: Shared exit point reached from VGA/EGA paths (via vga_compute_memory) and non-VGA path (via check_mda_or_tseng). Runs AH=EFh vendor probe with DX=0xFFFF sentinel; if DL changes a card was found, otherwise falls to detection_done.

1A34:291D.label: detection_done
1A34:291D.comment: All probes done; restores AX/BX/CX/ES/DI and returns. Caller reads results from [0xcfc4]/[0xcfc5]/[0xcfc1]/[0xcfc6].

1A34:0FC2.label: cga_mode_check
1A34:0FC2.comment: CGA-specific path reached when test [0xcfc4],0x23 is non-zero (CGA=0x02, bit 1 set). Checks if AL=0x07 (mono mode 7); if not, checks [0xcfc5] bits 0x1c (VGA/EGA flag). For CGA [0xcfc5]=0x02 → bits 0x1c clear → je to clc_ret. CGA path never calls INT 10h AH=00h to set the video mode — it assumes the current mode is already correct.

1A34:0FD3.label: clc_ret
1A34:0FD3.comment: Returns with CF=0 (success/no-op). Reached from cga_mode_check when the card is CGA and mode≠7. The video mode is not changed; CheckIt proceeds with whatever mode is currently active.

1A34:0FDA.label: check_mono_flag
1A34:0FDA.comment: Tests [0xcfc5] bit 0 (mono sub-flag). CGA [0xcfc5]=0x02 → bit 0 clear → fall through to jmp lbl_1A34_0F91 (run config copy + mode-dispatch hook). Entry point from 0xFF0 (jmp from mode-3 path).

1A34:0FED.label: select_mode3_config
1A34:0FED.comment: Sets BX=0x0f33 (pointer to the 80-col CGA mode-3 config record in CS). Jumps to check_mono_flag to continue initialization.

1A34:0FF2.label: init_mode3
1A34:0FF2.comment: Entry for video mode 3 (80-col color text). Loads AX=0x0103 (mode 3, page 0) then falls into select_mode3_config. Called via the mode-dispatch table at [0xa360] (BX=mode*2, table base 0xa35a). On CGA this path ends at clc_ret without ever issuing INT 10h AH=00h.

1A34:0F91.label: run_mode_config
1A34:0F91.comment: Core of the video config setup for all card types. Sets CX=0x27, calls init_video_mode_config (copies 39-byte mode record from CS:BX to DS:0xa3a0, calls the mode-init hook at [0xa3e2]). Then checks [0xcfc4] with test 0x23: non-zero (CGA) → jump to cga_mode_check (skip EGA/VGA block at 0x0FA3). Zero (EGA/VGA/SVGA) → fall through to the 31-byte EGA/VGA-only init block at 0x0FA3 (not executed in CGA run).

lineComments.1A34:2858: ES:DI = DS:0xd0cb — 64-byte buffer for AH=1Bh VGA state return
lineComments.1A34:285D: INT 10h AH=1Bh — VGA 'Return Video State'; VGA returns AL=0x1B and fills ES:DI buffer
lineComments.1A34:2862: AL=0x1B → VGA present (fall through); AL≠0x1B → jump to check_ega
lineComments.1A34:286B: BL = memory bank count from VGA state buffer (our stub leaves buffer at 0:0, so BL reads from IVT)
lineComments.1A34:286F: les di, [di] — load far ptr to VGA state buffer from [0xd0cb]; our stub leaves it 0:0 so DI=0
lineComments.1A34:2877: read byte 2 of VGA state buffer (SFT segment low byte); reads 0xC5 from IVT[0]+2 due to stub bug
lineComments.1A34:2883: bit 2 of VGA state byte: 0=analog VGA → keep 0x10; 1=SVGA/MCGA → override to 0x08
lineComments.1A34:2887: override card type [0xcfc4]=0x08 (SVGA/MCGA); bit 2 was set (0xC5 from IVT — coincidental garbage)
lineComments.1A34:2895: INT 10h AH=12h BL=10h — EGA 'Alternate Function Select'; on return BL=memory (0=64K..3=256K), BH=display type (0=color, 1=mono), CX=feature/switch bits
lineComments.1A34:289A: test BL bits 2-7: clear → EGA present (BL was overwritten with memory size); set → EGA absent (BL=0x10 unchanged) → jump to check_mda_or_tseng
lineComments.1A34:289F: read equipment flags from [0xcfc3] (copy of BIOS data area [0x0410])
lineComments.1A34:28A2: isolate display type bits 4-5 into AL (0x10=40-col CGA, 0x20=80-col CGA/EGA, 0x30=MDA); also zeroes AH
lineComments.1A34:28A5: 0x30=MDA+EGA; 0x20=80-col EGA on color display; jne skips 2-byte MDA path
lineComments.1A34:28AB: cmp AH (zeroed by AND) to BH (0=color, 1=mono from AH=12h); BH≠0 → mono EGA → not handled here
lineComments.1A34:28AF: EGA on color display confirmed; card type [0xcfc4]=0x04 (EGA)
lineComments.1A34:28B9: CL = EGA switch setting low nibble from CX (encodes monitor type)
lineComments.1A34:28BC: CL - 9: CF set if switch < 9 (standard monitor) → use vga_compute_memory; CF clear if ≥ 9 → alternate path (gap at 28C1)
lineComments.1A34:28D1: BX = (mem_banks+1) * 64KB: EGA BL=3 → 256KB (0x100); VGA BL=0 → 64KB (0x40, stub bug)
lineComments.1A34:28F3: INT 10h AH=EFh — non-standard vendor extension (not in IBM BIOS spec); DX=0xFFFF sentinel, card recognized if DL changes on return
lineComments.1A34:28F8: DL=0xFF unchanged → vendor card absent; jump to detection_done
lineComments.1A34:29E6: INT 10h AH=11h AL=30h — 'Get Font Info Pointer'; DL preset to 0x18 (25 rows), expects CX=char height and ES:BP=font table
lineComments.1A34:29F3: DL=0x18 → 0x19 (25 rows); our stub leaves CX=0 and ES:BP unchanged — CheckIt gets row count but no font pointer
lineComments.1A34:0F9C: gate: test [0xcfc4] bits 0,1,5 — CGA=0x02 (bit 1 set) → non-zero → jne skips EGA/VGA-only block at 0x0FA3; EGA=0x04/SVGA=0x08/VGA=0x10 have none of these bits → falls through to EGA/VGA init
lineComments.1A34:0FA1: CGA jumps here (to cga_mode_check at 0x0FC2); EGA/VGA falls through to 31-byte init block at 0x0FA3 (not executed in CGA run — likely contains INT 10h AH=00h mode set)
lineComments.1A34:0FC6: test [0xcfc5] bits 2-4 (EGA/VGA flag): CGA [0xcfc5]=0x02 → 0x02&0x1c=0 → ZF=1 → je clc_ret; VGA [0xcfc5]=0x18 → 0x18&0x1c=0x18 → falls through
lineComments.1A34:267D: rep stosw: fills DS:0xa3d6..0xa401 with 0x2926 (stub 'stc;ret' — default no-op for all mode dispatch slots including [0xa3e2])
lineComments.1A34:2688: rep movsb CX=0x27: copies 39-byte mode config record from CS:BX (0x0F33 for mode 3) into DS:0xa3a0..0xa3c6 — overwrites mode-specific fields but leaves [0xa3e2]=0x2926
lineComments.1A34:268F: call [0xa3e2]=0x2926 — mode-init hook; for CGA this is the stub 'stc; ret' so no INT 10h AH=00h is issued and the video mode is not changed
lineComments.1A34:2BD5: call [0xa360] via mode-dispatch table (BX=mode*2=6 → [0xa35a+6]=[0xa360]=0x0FF2 = init_mode3); dispatches to the mode-specific init function based on current video mode
lineComments.31A9:43A4: self-modifying: writes interrupt number (AL=[bp+0x06]) into the INT opcode byte at CS:0x43D0, turning 'int 0x10' into a generic BIOS call for any interrupt number
lineComments.1A34:2BBD: INT 10h AH=03h — get cursor position; saves row into [0xd0bb] and column into [0xd0bd] for use by the text rendering layer
lineComments.1A34:1057: INT 10h AH=05h AL=00h — select active display page 0; [0xa415]=0 was loaded into AX before this call
